title: Query D1 from Hono
excerpt: description: Query D1 from the Hono web framework image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Hono is a fast web framework for building API-first applications, and it includes first-class support for both [Workers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/) and [Pages](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/). * Ensure you have configured your [Wrangler configuration file](https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/get-started/#3-bind-your-worker-to-your-d1-database) to bind your D1 database to your Worker.
